title: A Netflix cooking show is changing how people travel — and restaurants are seeing bookings jump 303%
summary: Asia's food tourism scene attempts to angle itself between gourmet and authentic street food. Netflix show "Culinary Class Wars" replicates this contradiction.

title: Hannah Montana’s 20th Anniversary Inspires Merch From Stoney Clover Lane, Adidas and More
summary: The limited-edition collaborations span clothing, accessories and collectibles.
